title: A critical analysis of the scratch test for thermally sprayed coatings
authors: Rakesh Roshan, Akash Mishra, Arka Ghosh, Smruti Rekha Swain, Parth Patel, Pankaj Shrivastava
abstract: Abstract Thermally sprayed coatings are extensively used in aerospace, energy, automotive, and industrial applications because of their superior wear, corrosion, and high-temperature resistance. However, the reliable evaluation of coating adhesion and cohesive integrity remains a major challenge due to the complex lamellar microstructure, residual stresses, porosity, and heterogeneous failure behaviour inherent to thermal spray processes. Among the available characterization techniques, the scratch test has emerged as a rapid, versatile, and sensitive approach for assessing coating integrity and tribological performance. Despite its widespread use, the interpretation of scratch test results for thermally sprayed coatings is still fragmented, with significant variations in testing methodologies, failure criteria, and critical load determination techniques. This review critically analyses the scratch test specifically for thermally sprayed coatings by systematically correlating scratch response with coating microstructure, process parameters, residual stress, porosity, and failure mechanisms. The work comprehensively discusses the evolution of scratch testing, different scratching methodologies, operational parameters, and advanced critical load evaluation techniques such as optical microscopy, acoustic emission analysis, and multi-axis force measurements. Furthermore, the study consolidates and compares the findings of a wide range of coating systems processed through APS, HVOF, HVAF, D-gun, and related thermal spray techniques. The novelty of this work lies in providing an integrated and application-oriented perspective that bridges the gap between fundamental scratch mechanics and practical coating performance evaluation. Unlike previous studies that focus on isolated coating systems or individual testing approaches, this review establishes a unified understanding of how coating architecture and processing conditions govern scratch-induced damage and failure evolution. In addition, the manuscript identifies current limitations, inconsistencies in interpretation, and the need for standardization in scratch testing methodologies for thermally sprayed coatings. The present work, therefore serves as a comprehensive reference for researchers and industrial practitioners working toward the design, optimization, and reliable performance assessment of advanced thermal spray coatings.
venue: The International Journal of Advanced Manufacturing Technology

infographic.key_insight: Scratch testing is a fast, sensitive way to assess adhesion and cohesive failure in thermally sprayed coatings, but its results are only meaningful when linked to coating microstructure, residual stress, porosity, and failure mode.
infographic.engineering_relevance: For aerospace, energy, automotive, and industrial coatings, the review shows how scratch-test interpretation can guide coating selection, process optimization, and reliability screening.
method: Compared scratch response across thermal spray routes such as APS, HVOF, HVAF, and D-gun.
Correlated critical load and failure evolution with microstructure, porosity, and residual stress.
Reviewed critical-load evaluation tools including microscopy, acoustic emission, and multi-axis force sensing.
infographic.evidence_signal: The paper synthesizes and compares a broad set of published coating systems and scratch-test methodologies rather than presenting new experimental data.
infographic.watch_item: Scratch-test outcomes are highly method-dependent, so inconsistent test setups and failure criteria can lead to non-comparable critical loads.
infographic.paper_title: A critical analysis of the scratch test for thermally sprayed coatings

zh-Hans.title: 热喷涂涂层划痕试验的批判性分析
zh-Hans.abstract: 摘要 热喷涂涂层因其优异的耐磨、耐腐蚀和耐高温性能，已广泛应用于航空航天、能源、汽车及工业领域。然而，由于热喷涂过程固有的复杂层状微观结构、残余应力、孔隙率以及非均质失效行为，涂层黏附性和内聚完整性的可靠评价仍然是一项重大挑战。在现有表征技术中，划痕试验已成为一种快速、多用途且灵敏的手段，用于评估涂层完整性和摩擦学性能。尽管其应用广泛，热喷涂涂层划痕试验结果的解释仍较为分散，测试方法、失效判据和临界载荷确定技术存在显著差异。本综述专门针对热喷涂涂层的划痕试验开展批判性分析，系统关联划痕响应与涂层微观结构、工艺参数、残余应力、孔隙率及失效机制。本文全面讨论了划痕试验的发展演变、不同划痕方法、操作参数，以及先进的临界载荷评估技术，如光学显微镜、声发射分析和多轴力测量。此外，本文整合并比较了采用 APS、HVOF、HVAF、D-gun 及相关热喷涂技术制备的多种涂层体系的研究结果。本文的创新性在于提供一种综合的、面向应用的视角，弥合基础划痕力学与实际涂层性能评价之间的鸿沟。不同于以往聚焦于单一涂层体系或单独测试方法的研究，本综述建立了对涂层结构与加工条件如何支配划痕诱发损伤及失效演化的统一认识。此外，本文指出了当前的局限性、解释上的不一致，以及热喷涂涂层划痕试验方法标准化的必要性。因此，本文可作为从事先进热喷涂涂层设计、优化与可靠性能评估的研究人员和工业实践者的综合参考。

infographic.key_insight: 划痕试验是一种快速、灵敏的方法，可用于评估热喷涂涂层的黏附性和内聚失效，但其结果只有在与涂层微观结构、残余应力、孔隙率和失效模式关联时才具有意义。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 对于航空航天、能源、汽车和工业涂层，本综述展示了如何通过划痕试验解释来指导涂层选择、工艺优化和可靠性筛选。
method: 比较了 APS、HVOF、HVAF 和 D-gun 等热喷涂路线中的划痕响应。
将临界载荷和失效演化与微观结构、孔隙率和残余应力相关联。
综述了包括显微镜、声发射和多轴力传感在内的临界载荷评估工具。
infographic.evidence_signal: 本文综合并比较了大量已发表的涂层体系和划痕试验方法，而非提出新的实验数据。
infographic.watch_item: 划痕试验结果高度依赖方法设置，因此不一致的测试配置和失效判据可能导致临界载荷不可比。

title: MobileNetV3 for Pipeline Welding Defect Detection: A Computer Vision Approach on Noisy RGB Images
authors: Ata Jahangir Moshayedi, Amir Sohail Khan, Ming Jun Zhang, Shuxin Yang, David Bassir
abstract: Weld defect detection plays a central role in pipeline inspection because it directly influences structural reliability and operational safety.Conventional manual inspection methods suffer from several limitations, including high labor demands, subjective judgment, and inconsistent results, which restrict their effectiveness in large-scale industrial applications. To overcome these challenges, this study evaluates the use of the lightweight convolutional neural network MobileNetV3, considering both its Small and Large configurations, for automatic multi-class classification of pipeline weld defects.The proposed approach integrates image preprocessing and data augmentation with a lightweight deep learning architecture to extract discriminative visual features from weld images. Experimental validation is carried out using two datasets acquired under practical inspection conditions. The AI5083 dataset contains 4,927 images captured using HDR cameras, while the PWDID dataset includes 78 images collected with a mobile phone camera in uncontrolled environments.The experimental results demonstrate strong classification performance, achieving an accuracy of 99.99% on the AI5083 dataset and improved results on the PWDID dataset. Compared with previously reported methods, the proposed approach yields an accuracy improvement of approximately 3%, indicating its robustness across different acquisition settings. In addition to its high accuracy, MobileNetV3 offers fast inference, low memory consumption, and reduced power requirements. Owing to these characteristics and ias compatibility with deployment frameworks such as TensorFlow Lite, ONNX, and CoreML, MobileNetV3 is well suited for mobile and handheld inspection tools. Based on these findings, the use of MobileNetV3 and other modern lightweight architectures along with denoised function are recommended for practical, on device pipeline weld defect inspection systems.

infographic.key_insight: A lightweight MobileNetV3 classifier can accurately detect multiple pipeline weld defect classes from noisy RGB images, making automated inspection practical on-device.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The approach supports faster, more consistent pipeline quality control with low computational cost, which is valuable for handheld and mobile inspection workflows.
method: Preprocess and augment weld images to improve robustness to noise and variable acquisition conditions.
Train and compare MobileNetV3 Small and Large for multi-class defect classification.
Validate on two practical datasets collected with HDR cameras and a mobile phone in uncontrolled settings.
infographic.evidence_signal: The study reports 99.99% accuracy on the 4,927-image AI5083 dataset and improved performance on the smaller PWDID dataset, with about a 3% gain over prior methods.
infographic.watch_item: The very high reported performance may not fully transfer to real deployment unless class imbalance, domain shift, and low-quality field imagery are carefully handled.
infographic.paper_title: MobileNetV3 for Pipeline Welding Defect Detection: A Computer Vision Approach on Noisy RGB Images

zh-Hans.title: 用于管道焊接缺陷检测的 MobileNetV3：针对噪声 RGB 图像的计算机视觉方法
zh-Hans.abstract: 焊缝缺陷检测在管道检测中起着核心作用，因为它直接影响结构可靠性和运行安全。传统人工检测方法存在若干局限，包括劳动强度高、判断具有主观性以及结果不一致，这些因素限制了其在大规模工业应用中的有效性。为克服这些挑战，本研究评估了轻量级卷积神经网络 MobileNetV3 在管道焊缝缺陷自动多类别分类中的应用，并考察了其 Small 和 Large 两种配置。所提出的方法将图像预处理和数据增强与轻量级深度学习架构相结合，以从焊缝图像中提取具有判别性的视觉特征。实验验证基于两个在实际检测条件下采集的数据集进行。AI5083 数据集包含 4,927 张使用 HDR 相机拍摄的图像，而 PWDID 数据集包含 78 张在非受控环境中使用手机相机采集的图像。实验结果表明，该方法具有很强的分类性能，在 AI5083 数据集上达到 99.99% 的准确率，并在 PWDID 数据集上取得了改进的结果。与此前报道的方法相比，所提出的方法的准确率提高了约 3%，表明其在不同采集条件下具有鲁棒性。除了高准确率之外，MobileNetV3 还具有推理速度快、内存占用低和功耗较低等优点。由于这些特性以及其与 TensorFlow Lite、ONNX 和 CoreML 等部署框架的兼容性，MobileNetV3 非常适合移动式和手持式检测工具。基于这些发现，建议在实际的设备端管道焊缝缺陷检测系统中采用 MobileNetV3 及其他现代轻量级架构，并结合降噪功能。

infographic.key_insight: 轻量级 MobileNetV3 分类器能够从噪声 RGB 图像中准确检测多类管道焊缝缺陷，使自动化检测可在设备端实现。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该方法支持更快、更一致的管道质量控制，同时计算成本较低，这对手持式和移动式检测工作流程具有价值。
method: 对焊缝图像进行预处理和增强，以提高对噪声及变化采集条件的鲁棒性。
训练并比较用于多类别缺陷分类的 MobileNetV3 Small 和 Large。
在两个实际数据集上进行验证，这些数据集分别使用 HDR 相机和在非受控环境中的手机采集。
infographic.evidence_signal: 研究报告称，在包含 4,927 张图像的 AI5083 数据集上准确率达到 99.99%，并在较小的 PWDID 数据集上取得了更好的性能，较先前方法提升约 3%。
infographic.watch_item: 如果不认真处理类别不平衡、域偏移以及低质量现场图像，所报告的极高性能可能无法完全迁移到真实部署中。

title: HVAF Spraying of NiTi Coatings: Microstructure, Phase Transformation and Shape Memory Behavior
authors: Sneha Samal, Shrikant Joshi, Stefan Björklund, Mohit Chandra, Akhil Bhardwaj, Jaromír Kopeček
abstract: Depositing various coatings on surface of engineering components with the aim to improve their performance concerning wear, corrosion, friction and thermal protection is already a standard practice. Depositing metallic NiTi shape memory alloy coatings may be a viable alternative for hard ceramic coatings. NiTi coatings offer additional benefits originating from unique functional thermomechanical properties. However, fabrication of thick NiTi coatings turned out to be difficult. Standard electroplating and laser cladding methods are not suitable for NiTi the most widely used plasma spray methods tend to produce chemically inhomogeneous coatings that do not transform martensitically, cold sprayed NiTi coatings suffer from poor adhesion to the substrates. In this work we report on first ever successful fabrication of thick NiTi coatings (100-300 um) that display functional thermomechanical properties and simultaneously show very good adherence to the substrate. We used high velocity air fuel thermal spray method to fabricate NiTi coatings deposited on mild steel using four different sets of processing parameters. Chemical composition, porosity, microstructure, phase transformation and functional thermomechanical properties of the NiTi coatings were evaluated. Although the coatings contain inhomogeneous microstructure, voids, oxide particles, high density of dislocation defects and internal stress, they undergo martensitic transformation upon cooling and or mechanical loading. As sprayed NiTi coatings need to be annealed to display functional thermomechanical properties. Despite their limited tensile strength, the coatings displayed thermal actuation in 3 point bending tests and shape memory effects in nanoindentation and scratch tests.

infographic.key_insight: High-velocity air fuel (HVAF) spraying can produce thick NiTi coatings that retain martensitic transformation and shape-memory functionality after annealing.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This offers a practical route to add functional, self-actuating NiTi surfaces to steel components for wear-resistant, adaptive, and thermally responsive applications.
method: HVAF-sprayed NiTi coatings onto mild steel using four processing parameter sets
Characterized chemistry, porosity, microstructure, phase transformation behavior, and thermomechanical response
Compared as-sprayed and annealed coatings under thermal and mechanical loading
infographic.evidence_signal: The coatings were evaluated by microstructural and phase analyses plus 3-point bending, nanoindentation, and scratch tests, showing martensitic transformation and thermal actuation despite defects.
infographic.watch_item: As-sprayed coatings are not fully functional; annealing is required, and the coatings still show inhomogeneous microstructure, oxides, voids, and limited tensile strength.
infographic.paper_title: HVAF Spraying of NiTi Coatings: Microstructure, Phase Transformation and Shape Memory Behavior

zh-Hans.title: NiTi涂层的HVAF喷涂：显微组织、相变与形状记忆行为
zh-Hans.abstract: 在工程构件表面沉积各种涂层以提高其在耐磨、耐腐蚀、减摩和热防护方面的性能，已是一项标准做法。沉积金属NiTi形状记忆合金涂层可作为硬质陶瓷涂层的一种可行替代方案。NiTi涂层由于具有独特的功能性热机械性质，还带来额外优势。然而，制备厚NiTi涂层一直较为困难。标准电镀和激光熔覆方法并不适用于NiTi；最广泛使用的等离子喷涂方法往往会产生化学成分不均匀、且不发生马氏体转变的涂层；冷喷涂NiTi涂层则存在与基体结合力差的问题。在本研究中，我们报道了首次成功制备出厚NiTi涂层（100-300 um），这些涂层同时表现出功能性热机械性质，并且与基体具有非常良好的附着性。我们采用高速空气燃料热喷涂方法，在低碳钢上以四组不同工艺参数制备NiTi涂层。对NiTi涂层的化学成分、孔隙率、显微组织、相变以及功能性热机械性质进行了评估。尽管这些涂层含有不均匀显微组织、孔洞、氧化物颗粒、高密度位错缺陷和内应力，但它们在冷却和/或机械加载时会发生马氏体转变。喷涂态NiTi涂层需要经过退火才能表现出功能性热机械性质。尽管其抗拉强度有限，这些涂层在三点弯曲试验中表现出热致驱动效应，并在纳米压痕和划痕试验中表现出形状记忆效应。

infographic.key_insight: 高速空气燃料（HVAF）喷涂可制备厚NiTi涂层，这类涂层在退火后仍能保持马氏体转变和形状记忆功能。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这为在钢制构件上增加具有功能性的、自驱动的NiTi表面提供了一条实用途径，适用于耐磨、自适应和热响应应用。
method: 采用HVAF在低碳钢上以四组工艺参数制备NiTi涂层
表征化学成分、孔隙率、显微组织、相变行为和热机械响应
比较喷涂态与退火态涂层在热载荷和机械载荷下的表现
infographic.evidence_signal: 通过显微组织和相分析，以及三点弯曲、纳米压痕和划痕试验对涂层进行评估，结果表明尽管存在缺陷，仍发生马氏体转变并表现出热致驱动效应。
infographic.watch_item: 喷涂态涂层并非完全具备功能性；需要退火，且涂层仍表现出不均匀显微组织、氧化物、孔洞和有限的抗拉强度。

title: A welding penetration prediction model for laser welding process based on self-supervised learning using physics-informed neural networks
authors: Sen Li, Xiaoying Liu, Xiaojian Xu, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Ling Lan
abstract: The laser welding full-penetration is of critical importance, as it constitutes one of the fundamental factors in achieving defect-free welded joints. Accurate prediction of the penetration state is therefore essential for ensuring weld quality. To this end, this paper introduces SimPhysNet, a novel algorithm that achieves high classification accuracy in laser welding penetration prediction using only a limited number of labelled images. This approach effectively overcomes the limitations of supervised learning classification algorithms, which are hindered in industrial applications by their dependence on extensive, high-quality labelled data. The core of SimPhysNet is a unique self-supervised learning paradigm that embeds physical priors into a contrastive learning framework. By incorporating a physics-informed neural network (PINN), the model is guided to extract physically meaningful features of the molten pool and keyhole from a large set of unlabelled data, while three image augmentation tasks further enhance its generalization capabilities. Subsequently, a few-shot learning strategy, based on prototypical networks, enables robust classification by constructing class representations from a minimal set of labelled images. Experimental results demonstrate that SimPhysNet achieves a classification accuracy of 96.06% using only 200 labelled images (approximately 5% of the total labelled dataset), which is comparable to the performance of conventional supervised learning algorithms that utilize the entire labelled dataset. This work presents a new, efficient, and highly accurate method, providing the way for the intelligent automation of laser welding.

infographic.key_insight: SimPhysNet combines physics-informed self-supervision with few-shot prototypical classification to predict laser welding penetration accurately from very limited labeled images.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This reduces labeling burden while supporting reliable real-time weld quality monitoring and automation in laser welding production.
method: Use a PINN inside a contrastive self-supervised framework to learn physically meaningful molten-pool/keyhole features from unlabeled images.
Apply three image augmentation tasks to improve feature robustness and generalization.
Classify penetration state with a few-shot prototypical network built from a small labeled set.
infographic.evidence_signal: The model reached 96.06% classification accuracy using only 200 labeled images, about 5% of the labeled dataset, and was reported as comparable to fully supervised methods.
infographic.watch_item: Performance may depend on the quality and representativeness of the physics priors, unlabeled pool/keyhole imagery, and the specific welding setup.
infographic.paper_title: A welding penetration prediction model for laser welding process based on self-supervised learning using physics-informed neural networks

zh-Hans.title: 一种基于物理信息神经网络自监督学习的激光焊接过程焊缝熔深预测模型
zh-Hans.abstract: 激光焊接全熔透至关重要，因为它是实现无缺陷焊接接头的基本因素之一。因此，准确预测熔深状态对于保证焊接质量至关重要。为此，本文提出 SimPhysNet，这是一种新型算法，仅利用有限数量的标注图像即可在激光焊接熔深预测中实现较高的分类精度。该方法有效克服了监督学习分类算法的局限性，因为此类算法在工业应用中受限于对大量高质量标注数据的依赖。SimPhysNet 的核心是一种独特的自监督学习范式，它将物理先验嵌入对比学习框架中。通过引入物理信息神经网络（PINN），模型被引导从大量无标注数据中提取熔池和小孔的物理有意义特征，而三种图像增强任务进一步提升了其泛化能力。随后，基于原型网络的少样本学习策略通过从极少量标注图像中构建类别表征，实现了稳健分类。实验结果表明，SimPhysNet 仅使用 200 张标注图像（约占全部标注数据集的 5%）即可达到 96.06% 的分类准确率，这与利用完整标注数据集的传统监督学习算法的性能相当。该工作提出了一种新的、高效且高精度的方法，为激光焊接的智能自动化提供了途径。

infographic.key_insight: SimPhysNet 将物理信息自监督与少样本原型分类相结合，能够仅凭极少量标注图像准确预测激光焊接熔深。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这降低了标注负担，同时支持激光焊接生产中可靠的实时焊缝质量监测与自动化。
method: 在对比自监督框架中使用 PINN，从无标注图像中学习具有物理意义的熔池/小孔特征。
应用三种图像增强任务以提升特征鲁棒性和泛化能力。
利用由少量标注集构建的少样本原型网络对熔深状态进行分类。
infographic.evidence_signal: 该模型仅使用 200 张标注图像（约为标注数据集的 5%）就达到了 96.06% 的分类准确率，并被报道为可与全监督方法相媲美。
infographic.watch_item: 性能可能取决于物理先验、无标注熔池/小孔图像以及具体焊接设置的质量和代表性。

title: Implementation of Six Sigma DMAIC Methodology for Eliminating Spot Crack Defects in Automotive Resistance Spot Welding Process
authors: Reza Febriyana, Heru Darmawan, Rani Rahmadiyani
abstract: Automotive welding processes require high process stability because welding defects directly influence product reliability and manufacturing cost. This study investigates the reduction of spot crack defects in an automotive Rear Door welding process using the Six Sigma DMAIC (Define–Measure–Analyze–Improve–Control) methodology. A quantitative case study approach was applied by integrating defect analysis, process capability measurement, Pareto analysis, Fishbone analysis, and corrective action implementation. The initial assessment identified 20 spot crack defects from 2,400 production units, resulting in a DPMO value of 2,083.33 and a process capability level of 4.37 sigma. Root cause analysis revealed that the defects were mainly associated with insufficient operator knowledge, unstable welding gun positioning due to damaged gun shanks, limited inspection coverage, and the absence of welding position control. Improvement actions included operator retraining, equipment replacement, additional inspection points, and implementation of a welding gun guide fixture. After improvement implementation, monitoring of 2,380 production units showed zero spot crack defects, achieving a DPMO value of 0 and process capability above 6 sigma. The findings demonstrate that a structured Six Sigma DMAIC approach combined with welding-specific process controls can effectively enhance automotive welding quality and support sustainable defect prevention.

infographic.key_insight: Applying Six Sigma DMAIC to automotive resistance spot welding eliminated spot crack defects by addressing operator, equipment, inspection, and positioning causes.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The study shows that structured quality-control workflows can quickly improve weld reliability and reduce manufacturing scrap in automotive assembly lines.
method: Defined the defect problem in Rear Door spot welding
Measured baseline performance with DPMO and sigma capability
Analyzed root causes using Pareto and Fishbone tools
Improved the process with retraining, equipment replacement, added inspection points, and a gun guide fixture
infographic.evidence_signal: Baseline performance was 20 defects in 2,400 units (DPMO 2,083.33; 4.37 sigma), and after corrective actions 2,380 units were produced with zero spot crack defects (DPMO 0; above 6 sigma).
infographic.watch_item: Results come from a single case study, so sustained gains may depend on consistent maintenance, operator adherence, and replication across other weld lines.
infographic.paper_title: Implementation of Six Sigma DMAIC Methodology for Eliminating Spot Crack Defects in Automotive Resistance Spot Welding Process

zh-Hans.title: 六西格玛DMAIC方法在汽车电阻点焊工艺中消除点状裂纹缺陷的实施
zh-Hans.abstract: 汽车焊接过程要求很高的过程稳定性，因为焊接缺陷会直接影响产品可靠性和制造成本。本研究采用六西格玛DMAIC（Define–Measure–Analyze–Improve–Control，定义–测量–分析–改进–控制）方法，研究汽车后门焊接过程中点状裂纹缺陷的减少。通过整合缺陷分析、过程能力测量、帕累托分析、鱼骨图分析和纠正措施实施，采用定量案例研究方法。初步评估识别出2,400个生产单元中的20个点状裂纹缺陷，得到DPMO值2,083.33和4.37 sigma的过程能力水平。根因分析表明，缺陷主要与操作人员知识不足、由于焊枪枪臂损坏导致的焊枪定位不稳定、检验覆盖范围有限以及缺乏焊接位置控制有关。改进措施包括操作员再培训、设备更换、增加检验点以及实施焊枪导向夹具。改进实施后，对2,380个生产单元的监测显示点状裂纹缺陷为零，实现DPMO值为0，过程能力高于6 sigma。研究结果表明，结构化的六西格玛DMAIC方法结合焊接特定的过程控制，可以有效提升汽车焊接质量，并支持可持续的缺陷预防。

infographic.key_insight: 将六西格玛DMAIC应用于汽车电阻点焊，通过解决操作、设备、检验和定位原因，消除了点状裂纹缺陷。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 研究表明，结构化质量控制工作流程能够快速提高焊缝可靠性，并减少汽车装配线中的制造报废。
method: 定义后门点焊中的缺陷问题
使用DPMO和sigma能力测量基线性能
利用帕累托和鱼骨图工具分析根因
通过再培训、设备更换、增加检验点和焊枪导向夹具改进工艺
infographic.evidence_signal: 基线性能为2,400个单元中20个缺陷（DPMO 2,083.33；4.37 sigma），纠正措施实施后生产了2,380个单元且点状裂纹缺陷为零（DPMO 0；高于6 sigma）。
infographic.watch_item: 结果来自单一案例研究，因此持续收益可能取决于持续维护、操作员遵守程度以及在其他焊接产线上的复制。

title: Enhanced Seam Segmentation for Automated Welding Robot in Construction Through Transfer Learning: Addressing Limitations of Bilateral Segmentation Network
authors: Keonvin Park, Yong Ann Voeurn, Hyeokjun Kweon, Doyun Lee
abstract: Reliable seam segmentation is essential for autonomous robotic welding in construction, where harsh illumination, specular reflections, and thin weld geometries often degrade segmentation performance. This study proposes a reflection-robust seam segmentation framework that enhances a BiSeNetV2 backbone through transfer learning and a hybrid Cross-Entropy--Lovász loss. Rather than increasing architectural complexity, the proposed framework improves reflection robustness through learning-stability-oriented optimization. Experimental results show that the proposed method achieves 81.76\% Joint IoU and 90.73\% mIoU, improving Joint IoU by +22.36 percentage points over the OHEM-based baseline while maintaining identical FLOPs, parameter count, and inference speed. The proposed approach also recovers 96.33\% of severe zero-IoU failure cases under reflective conditions. Comparative experiments across BiSeNetV2, DeepLabV3+, UNet, and SegFormer further demonstrate that the proposed optimization strategy is particularly effective for lightweight real-time segmentation architectures. Qualitative analyses additionally show improved seam continuity and reflection robustness in challenging welding environments. These findings suggest that the proposed framework provides a practical and lightweight perception solution for robotic welding applications involving reflective metallic surfaces.

infographic.key_insight: A transfer-learning + hybrid Cross-Entropy/Lovász optimization makes BiSeNetV2 far more robust for reflective weld seam segmentation without increasing model complexity.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This offers a lightweight, real-time perception upgrade for construction welding robots operating under harsh lighting and specular metal reflections.
method: BiSeNetV2 backbone enhanced via transfer learning
Hybrid Cross-Entropy + Lovász loss to stabilize seam learning
Focused on reflection-robust optimization rather than adding architectural depth
infographic.evidence_signal: The proposed method reached 81.76% Joint IoU and 90.73% mIoU, improving Joint IoU by 22.36 points over the OHEM baseline while keeping FLOPs, parameters, and inference speed unchanged.
infographic.watch_item: Performance gains are shown on seam segmentation benchmarks, but deployment may still require careful tuning for unseen surface finishes, lighting setups, and camera geometries.
infographic.paper_title: Enhanced Seam Segmentation for Automated Welding Robot in Construction Through Transfer Learning: Addressing Limitations of Bilateral Segmentation Network

zh-Hans.title: 通过迁移学习增强建筑施工中自动焊接机器人的焊缝分割：解决双边分割网络的局限性
zh-Hans.abstract: 可靠的焊缝分割对于建筑施工中的自主机器人焊接至关重要，因为恶劣照明、镜面反射以及细窄的焊缝几何形态常常会降低分割性能。本研究提出一种抗反射焊缝分割框架，通过迁移学习和混合交叉熵—Lovász损失增强BiSeNetV2骨干网络。所提出的框架并未增加架构复杂度，而是通过以学习稳定性为导向的优化来提升抗反射能力。实验结果表明，所提出的方法达到81.76% 的Joint IoU和90.73% 的mIoU，在保持FLOPs、参数量和推理速度完全相同的情况下，相比基于OHEM的基线方法将Joint IoU提高了22.36个百分点。该方法还恢复了在反射条件下96.33% 的严重零IoU失效案例。跨BiSeNetV2、DeepLabV3+、UNet和SegFormer的对比实验进一步表明，所提出的优化策略对轻量级实时分割架构尤其有效。定性分析还显示，在具有挑战性的焊接环境中，焊缝连续性和抗反射能力均有所提升。这些发现表明，所提出的框架为涉及反射金属表面的机器人焊接应用提供了一种实用且轻量的感知解决方案。

infographic.key_insight: 迁移学习 + 混合交叉熵/Lovász 优化使BiSeNetV2在反射性焊缝分割中更加鲁棒，而不会增加模型复杂度。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这为在恶劣照明和镜面金属反射条件下运行的建筑焊接机器人提供了一种轻量级、实时的感知升级方案。
method: 通过迁移学习增强BiSeNetV2骨干网络
采用混合交叉熵 + Lovász损失以稳定焊缝学习
聚焦于抗反射优化，而非增加架构深度
infographic.evidence_signal: 所提出的方法达到了81.76%的Joint IoU和90.73%的mIoU，在保持FLOPs、参数量和推理速度不变的情况下，相比OHEM基线将Joint IoU提高了22.36个百分点。
infographic.watch_item: 性能提升已在焊缝分割基准上得到验证，但在部署时仍可能需要针对未见过的表面处理、照明设置和相机几何进行仔细调优。

title: A multi-task spatiotemporal deep neural network for predicting penetration depth and morphology in laser welding
authors: Sen Li, Haichao Cui, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Xinhua Tang
abstract: In laser penetration welding, the assessment of penetration state and weld seam morphology plays a crucial role in determining the weld quality. This paper presents a comprehensive introduction of the innovative muti-task deep learning model that has the capability to predict penetration state, depth, and weld seam morphology with high accuracy. The monitoring platform relies on weld pool images captured during the laser welding process using a complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor camera. The proposed model integrates spatiotemporal features extracted from top weld pool images along with welding parameters, establishing a deep learning framework based on convolutional neural networks and state space models for more efficient extraction and processing of spatial-temporal information. Furthermore, a reliable method for constructing the dataset is proposed to enhance both robustness and generalization capability of the developed model. Validation results on the test set demonstrate that prediction accuracy for penetration state can reach 99.35%, while prediction error for penetration depth is 1.79 millimeter, and accuracy of reconstructing the weld cross-section is 95.65%. This study provides new insights and methodologies for in-situ quality control strategies in laser penetration welding systems.

infographic.key_insight: A multi-task spatiotemporal deep learning model can use weld-pool images and process parameters to predict penetration state, penetration depth, and weld cross-section morphology during laser welding.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This enables real-time in-situ quality monitoring and could reduce defects by supporting closed-loop control in laser penetration welding.
method: Captured top weld-pool images with a CMOS camera during welding.
Combined CNN-based spatial feature extraction with state-space temporal modeling and welding parameters.
Built a robust dataset and trained a multi-task predictor for penetration state, depth, and seam morphology.
infographic.evidence_signal: On the test set, the model achieved 99.35% penetration-state accuracy, 1.79 mm penetration-depth error, and 95.65% cross-section reconstruction accuracy.
infographic.watch_item: Performance may depend on consistent camera setup, image quality, and process conditions, so generalization to new weld configurations should be validated carefully.
infographic.paper_title: A multi-task spatiotemporal deep neural network for predicting penetration depth and morphology in laser welding

zh-Hans.title: 一种用于预测激光焊接中熔深和形貌的多任务时空深度神经网络
zh-Hans.abstract: 在激光穿透焊接中，对穿透状态和焊缝形貌的评估在决定焊接质量方面起着至关重要的作用。本文系统介绍了一种创新的多任务深度学习模型，该模型能够高精度预测穿透状态、熔深和焊缝形貌。监测平台依赖于激光焊接过程中使用互补金属氧化物半导体（CMOS）相机采集的熔池图像。所提出的模型将从顶部熔池图像中提取的时空特征与焊接参数相结合，建立了一个基于卷积神经网络和状态空间模型的深度学习框架，以更高效地提取和处理时空信息。此外，本文提出了一种可靠的数据集构建方法，以增强所开发模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力。测试集上的验证结果表明，穿透状态预测准确率可达99.35%，熔深预测误差为1.79毫米，焊缝横截面重建准确率为95.65%。本研究为激光穿透焊接系统中的在线质量控制策略提供了新的见解和方法。

infographic.key_insight: 多任务时空深度学习模型可以利用熔池图像和工艺参数，在激光焊接过程中预测穿透状态、熔深和焊缝横截面形貌。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这使得实时在线质量监测成为可能，并可通过支持激光穿透焊接中的闭环控制来减少缺陷。
method: 在焊接过程中使用CMOS相机采集顶部熔池图像。
将基于CNN的空间特征提取与状态空间时序建模及焊接参数相结合。
构建鲁棒数据集，并训练用于穿透状态、熔深和焊缝形貌预测的多任务模型。
infographic.evidence_signal: 在测试集上，该模型实现了99.35%的穿透状态准确率、1.79毫米的熔深误差以及95.65%的横截面重建准确率。
infographic.watch_item: 性能可能依赖于一致的相机设置、图像质量和工艺条件，因此应谨慎验证其在新的焊缝配置上的泛化能力。

title: A cross-process welding penetration status prediction algorithm based on unsupervised domain adaptation in laser and TIG welding
authors: Sen Li, Haichao Cui, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Xinhua Tang
abstract: Supervised deep learning has been widely used for weld penetration state classification; however, its performance often degrades significantly under domain shift, such as when transferring models between welding processes with distinct physical mechanisms:for instance, from arc-dominated tungsten inert gas (TIG) welding to keyhole-based laser welding. To overcome this limitation, we propose an unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) framework integrated with a gradual source domain expansion (GSDE) strategy. Evaluated on dedicated TIG and laser welding datasets, our approach achieves high accuracy in both same-process and cross-process transfer tasks. Specifically, it attains average accuracies of 90.65% on TIGFH and 90.72% on LSPS in same-process settings, surpassing a supervised baseline by 35.83% and 38.87%, respectively. More notably, in cross-process scenarios, it reaches 80.48% for TIG to Laser and 81.13% for Laser to TIG, improving upon the baseline by 43.39% and 43.40%. UMAP visualizations verify that the model learns domain-invariant features while maintaining discriminative class boundaries. This method considerably lowers the relabeling cost for new welding processes and enhances the versatility of intelligent monitoring across different welding systems.

infographic.key_insight: An unsupervised domain adaptation framework with gradual source domain expansion can transfer weld penetration state prediction across fundamentally different welding processes without requiring target-process labels.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This improves intelligent welding monitoring by reducing relabeling effort and enabling robust deployment across TIG and laser welding systems with different physical mechanisms.
method: Train a UDA model to learn domain-invariant representations between source and target welding processes.
Use gradual source domain expansion (GSDE) to progressively broaden source-domain coverage during adaptation.
Validate transfer on same-process and cross-process weld penetration classification tasks with UMAP feature-space checks.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports average accuracies of 90.65% on TIGFH and 90.72% on LSPS in same-process settings, and 80.48% TIG→Laser plus 81.13% Laser→TIG in cross-process transfer, each far above the supervised baseline.
infographic.watch_item: Performance gains are reported on dedicated TIG and laser datasets, so generalization to other materials, sensing setups, or welding regimes still needs verification.
infographic.paper_title: A cross-process welding penetration status prediction algorithm based on unsupervised domain adaptation in laser and TIG welding

zh-Hans.title: 基于激光和TIG焊接中无监督领域自适应的跨工艺焊缝熔深状态预测算法
zh-Hans.abstract: 监督式深度学习已被广泛用于焊缝熔深状态分类；然而，当模型在具有不同物理机理的焊接工艺之间迁移时，例如从电弧主导的钨极惰性气体（TIG）焊接迁移到基于小孔的激光焊接时，其性能往往会因领域偏移而显著下降。为克服这一局限，我们提出了一种集成渐进式源域扩展（GSDE）策略的无监督领域自适应（UDA）框架。在专用的TIG和激光焊接数据集上评估后，我们的方法在同工艺和跨工艺迁移任务中均取得了较高准确率。具体而言，在同工艺设置下，它在TIGFH和LSPS上的平均准确率分别达到90.65%和90.72%，较监督式基线分别提升35.83%和38.87%。更值得注意的是，在跨工艺场景中，它从TIG到Laser达到80.48%，从Laser到TIG达到81.13%，相较基线分别提高43.39%和43.40%。UMAP可视化验证了该模型在保持可分辨类别边界的同时学习到了领域不变特征。该方法显著降低了新焊接工艺的重标注成本，并增强了智能监测在不同焊接系统中的通用性。

infographic.key_insight: 结合渐进式源域扩展的无监督领域自适应框架，可以在不需要目标工艺标签的情况下，在本质上不同的焊接工艺之间迁移焊缝熔深状态预测。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这通过减少重标注工作量，并支持在具有不同物理机理的TIG和激光焊接系统上进行鲁棒部署，从而提升了智能焊接监测能力。
method: 训练一个UDA模型，以学习源焊接工艺与目标焊接工艺之间领域不变的表示。
使用渐进式源域扩展（GSDE）在自适应过程中逐步扩大源域覆盖范围。
通过同工艺和跨工艺焊缝熔深分类任务，并结合UMAP特征空间检查，对迁移效果进行验证。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告了同工艺设置下TIGFH和LSPS的平均准确率分别为90.65%和90.72%，跨工艺迁移中TIG→Laser为80.48%、Laser→TIG为81.13%，均远高于监督式基线。
infographic.watch_item: 性能提升是在专用的TIG和激光数据集上报告的，因此其在其他材料、传感配置或焊接制度上的泛化能力仍需验证。

title: Tribological enhancement of Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 D-gun coated Ti-6Al-4V alloy: A machine learning approach
authors: Selwyn Jebadurai Devaraj, A. Arul Jeya Kumar, A Queen Alice, V Manoj Kumar, S Arokya Agustin, A Sarath Chandra
abstract: Ti-6Al-4V alloy is used a lot in aerospace, biomedical and marine applications. This study investigates the tribological behaviour of Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 coated and uncoated Ti-6Al-4V alloy by experimental and machine learning approaches. An Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 ceramic coating, approximately 200 µm thick, was applied to Ti-6Al-4V alloy via the detonation gun (D-gun) process under regulated conditions (oxygen flow: 4800 SLPH, acetylene: 2150 SLPH, stand-off distance: 180 mm, particle velocity ∼1200 m/s). The wear behaviour of samples was tested using a pin-on-disc apparatus in accordance with ASTM G99 standards. Tests were conducted under normal loads of 40–100 N, sliding speeds of 100–200 rpm and durations of 20–40 min against an EN31 steel counter face. Scanning electron microscopy demonstrated that coated surfaces exhibited reduced wear and formed a protective tribo-layer. Machine learning models such as artificial neural networks, K-nearest neighbours and random forest were developed to predict wear based on sliding parameters. Random forest proved to be the best choice with less mean percentage error and mean squared error. The results showed that D-gun deposited Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 coatings improved the wear performance of Ti-6Al-4V.
venue: Proceedings of the Institution of Mechanical Engineers Part E Journal of Process Mechanical Engineering

infographic.key_insight: A D-gun deposited Al2O3–TiO2 coating substantially improves the tribological performance of Ti-6Al-4V by reducing wear and promoting a protective tribo-layer.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The study shows that detonation-sprayed ceramic coatings can extend the wear resistance of titanium alloys used in aerospace, biomedical, and marine components.
method: Applied ~200 µm Al2O3–TiO2 coating on Ti-6Al-4V using the detonation gun process.
Evaluated wear with ASTM G99 pin-on-disc tests against EN31 steel at 40–100 N, 100–200 rpm, and 20–40 min.
Built ANN, KNN, and random forest models to predict wear from sliding parameters.
infographic.evidence_signal: Scanning electron microscopy showed reduced wear on coated samples, and random forest gave the lowest mean percentage error and mean squared error among the tested models.
infographic.watch_item: Performance depends on controlled D-gun processing and the tested load/speed range, so broader validation is needed before generalizing to other operating conditions.
infographic.paper_title: Tribological enhancement of Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 D-gun coated Ti-6Al-4V alloy: A machine learning approach

zh-Hans.title: Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2 D枪涂层Ti-6Al-4V合金的摩擦学增强：一种机器学习方法
zh-Hans.abstract: Ti-6Al-4V合金广泛用于航空航天、生物医学和海洋应用。本研究通过实验和机器学习方法，考察了Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2涂层与未涂层Ti-6Al-4V合金的摩擦学行为。采用受控条件下的爆炸喷涂枪（D-gun）工艺将约200 µm厚的Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2陶瓷涂层施加于Ti-6Al-4V合金上（氧气流量：4800 SLPH，乙炔：2150 SLPH，喷距：180 mm，颗粒速度约1200 m/s）。按照ASTM G99标准，使用销-盘磨损试验机测试样品的磨损行为。试验在EN31钢对偶表面条件下进行，法向载荷为40–100 N，滑动速度为100–200 rpm，持续时间为20–40 min。扫描电子显微镜表明，涂层表面磨损减轻，并形成了保护性摩擦层。建立了人工神经网络、K近邻和随机森林等机器学习模型，根据滑动参数预测磨损。随机森林以更低的平均百分比误差和均方误差表现最佳。结果表明，D-gun沉积的Al 2 O 3 -TiO 2涂层提高了Ti-6Al-4V的耐磨性能。

infographic.key_insight: D-gun沉积的Al2O3–TiO2涂层通过减少磨损并促进保护性摩擦层形成，显著提升了Ti-6Al-4V的摩擦学性能。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该研究表明，爆炸喷涂陶瓷涂层可延长用于航空航天、生物医学和海洋部件的钛合金耐磨寿命。
method: 采用爆炸喷涂枪工艺在Ti-6Al-4V上施加约200 µm厚的Al2O3–TiO2涂层。
按照ASTM G99销-盘试验，在EN31钢对偶条件下，于40–100 N、100–200 rpm和20–40 min范围内评估磨损。
构建ANN、KNN和随机森林模型，根据滑动参数预测磨损。
infographic.evidence_signal: 扫描电子显微镜显示涂层样品的磨损减轻，且在所测试模型中，随机森林的平均百分比误差和均方误差最低。
infographic.watch_item: 性能依赖于受控的D-gun工艺以及所测试的载荷/速度范围，因此在推广到其他工况之前仍需更广泛的验证。

title: Physics-Guided Spatiotemporal State Space Modeling for Lookahead Molten Pool Segmentation in Laser Wire-Feed Welding
authors: Sen Li, Haichao Cui, Changhao Yin, Chendong Shao, Yaqi Wang, Xinhua Tang
abstract: Real-time weld-pool perception is critical for closed-loop control in laser wire-feed welding, where sensing, computation, and actuator response introduce unavoidable delay. This paper presents a physics-guided spatiotemporal state space network for lookahead weld-pool segmentation. The model uses historical coaxial grayscale images, welding process parameters, and aligned wire-state electrical signals to predict the future semantic layout of three physically meaningful regions: keyhole, wire, and molten pool. It combines a visual encoder, process- and sensor-conditioned feature normalization, patch-level temporal state space modeling, horizon-conditioned latent prediction, dense future feature prediction, and a motion-aware mask decoder. Auxiliary signed-distance-function supervision, temporal consistency, feature distillation, and fine-grained keyhole losses further constrain the predicted geometry and local motion. Experiments on a 43-sequence laser welding dataset show that the proposed WeldMamba reaches 74.63\% mIoU at a 500 ms lookahead. Ablation studies further show that temporal history, patch-level state space modeling, and keyhole motion awareness are the main contributors to robust future segmentation.

infographic.key_insight: WeldMamba predicts future weld-pool regions from past images, process parameters, and sensor signals to compensate for control delay in laser wire-feed welding.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This enables more reliable real-time closed-loop welding control by providing lookahead segmentation of keyhole, wire, and molten-pool states.
method: Physics-guided spatiotemporal state space model for future semantic segmentation
Fuses coaxial grayscale video with welding parameters and aligned wire-state electrical signals
Uses temporal history, horizon-conditioned prediction, and motion-aware decoding with geometry-aware auxiliary losses
infographic.evidence_signal: On a 43-sequence laser welding dataset, the method achieved 74.63% mIoU at a 500 ms lookahead.
infographic.watch_item: Performance depends on accurate time alignment and sensor availability, so robustness may drop if signals are noisy or deployment timing shifts.
infographic.paper_title: Physics-Guided Spatiotemporal State Space Modeling for Lookahead Molten Pool Segmentation in Laser Wire-Feed Welding

zh-Hans.title: 面向激光送丝焊接中前瞻熔池分割的物理引导时空状态空间建模
zh-Hans.abstract: 在激光送丝焊接中，实时焊池感知对于闭环控制至关重要，因为传感、计算和执行器响应会引入不可避免的延迟。本文提出一种用于前瞻焊池分割的物理引导时空状态空间网络。该模型利用历史同轴灰度图像、焊接工艺参数以及对齐的线态电信号，预测三个具有物理意义的区域在未来的语义布局：小孔、焊丝和熔池。该方法结合了视觉编码器、受工艺与传感器条件约束的特征归一化、补丁级时间状态空间建模、受预测时域条件约束的潜在预测、稠密未来特征预测以及具备运动感知的掩码解码器。辅助的符号距离函数监督、时间一致性、特征蒸馏以及细粒度小孔损失进一步约束了预测几何形状和局部运动。在一个包含43个序列的激光焊接数据集上的实验表明，所提出的 WeldMamba 在500 ms前瞻条件下达到 74.63% 的 mIoU。消融研究进一步表明，时间历史、补丁级状态空间建模以及小孔运动感知是实现稳健未来分割的主要贡献因素。

infographic.key_insight: WeldMamba 利用过去的图像、工艺参数和传感器信号预测未来的焊池区域，以补偿激光送丝焊接中的控制延迟。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这使得通过提供对小孔、焊丝和熔池状态的前瞻分割，能够实现更可靠的实时闭环焊接控制。
method: 用于未来语义分割的物理引导时空状态空间模型
融合同轴灰度视频、焊接参数以及对齐的线态电信号
采用时间历史、受预测时域条件约束的预测以及具备运动感知的解码，并结合几何感知辅助损失
infographic.evidence_signal: 在一个包含43个序列的激光焊接数据集上，该方法在500 ms前瞻条件下达到 74.63% 的 mIoU。
infographic.watch_item: 性能依赖于精确的时间对齐和传感器可用性，因此如果信号存在噪声或部署时序发生偏移，鲁棒性可能下降。

title: Effect of Barrel Filling Ratio on the Microstructure, Phase Composition and Tribological Performance of Detonation-Sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr Coatings
authors: Zhuldyz Sagdoldina, Aiym Nabioldina, Daryn Baizhan, Nurbol Berdimuratov, Gulsym Bektasova
abstract: This study investigates the influence of barrel filling ratio on the microstructure, phase composition, and tribological performance of detonation-sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings. Coatings were deposited at barrel filling ratios of 43% and 53% under identical spraying conditions. Microstructural characterization revealed the formation of dense lamellar coatings with low porosity and uniform distribution of Cr3C2 carbide particles within the NiCr metallic matrix. Compared with the coating deposited at a barrel filling ratio of 43%, the coating deposited at 53% exhibited a denser microstructure. X-ray diffraction analysis confirmed that Cr3C2 and NiCr remained the dominant phases after spraying, while a minor amount of Cr7C3 formed due to partial decarburization of chromium carbide during thermal exposure. Tribological performance was evaluated under dry sliding conditions using a ball-on-disc configuration at normal loads of 10 and 15 N and sliding speeds of 5 and 10 cm/s. Wear volume was determined from the geometry of the wear track after testing, and wear rate was calculated accordingly. The coating produced at a barrel filling ratio of 53% demonstrated improved wear resistance under elevated loads despite exhibiting a higher coefficient of friction. The minimum wear rate reached 1.23 × 10−4 mm3/(m·N), which was associated with reduced porosity and enhanced structural integrity of the coating. The obtained results demonstrate that optimization of detonation spraying parameters significantly affects coating structure and tribological behavior. The developed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings are promising protective materials for components operating under severe friction and wear conditions, including industrial and high-temperature engineering applications.

infographic.key_insight: Increasing the barrel filling ratio from 43% to 53% produced denser detonation-sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings with better wear resistance, despite a slightly higher friction coefficient.
infographic.engineering_relevance: Optimizing detonation-spraying fill ratio can improve coating integrity and durability for wear-critical components in harsh mechanical and high-temperature environments.
method: Detonation-sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr coatings at two barrel filling ratios: 43% and 53%.
Compared microstructure and phase composition using microscopy and XRD.
Evaluated dry-sliding tribology with ball-on-disc tests at 10 and 15 N and 5 and 10 cm/s.
infographic.evidence_signal: The 53% fill coating showed lower porosity and reached a minimum wear rate of 1.23 × 10^-4 mm3/(m·N) under the reported sliding tests.
infographic.watch_item: The improved wear resistance came with a higher coefficient of friction, so real-world adoption should consider the friction–wear tradeoff and loading conditions.
infographic.paper_title: Effect of Barrel Filling Ratio on the Microstructure, Phase Composition and Tribological Performance of Detonation-Sprayed Cr3C2–NiCr Coatings

zh-Hans.title: 桶内填充率对爆炸喷涂 Cr3C2–NiCr 涂层微观结构、相组成和摩擦学性能的影响
zh-Hans.abstract: 本研究考察了桶内填充率对爆炸喷涂 Cr3C2–NiCr 涂层微观结构、相组成和摩擦学性能的影响。在相同喷涂条件下，分别在 43% 和 53% 的桶内填充率下制备涂层。微观结构表征显示，涂层形成了致密的层状结构，孔隙率低，Cr3C2 碳化物颗粒在 NiCr 金属基体中分布均匀。与 43% 桶内填充率下制备的涂层相比，53% 条件下制备的涂层表现出更致密的微观结构。X 射线衍射分析证实，喷涂后 Cr3C2 和 NiCr 仍为主导相，而由于热暴露过程中铬碳化物发生部分脱碳，生成了少量 Cr7C3。采用球-盘形式在干滑动条件下评估摩擦学性能，法向载荷为 10 和 15 N，滑动速度为 5 和 10 cm/s。磨损体积由试验后磨痕几何形貌确定，并据此计算磨损率。53% 桶内填充率制备的涂层在较高载荷下表现出更好的耐磨性，尽管其摩擦系数更高。最小磨损率达到 1.23 × 10−4 mm3/(m·N)，这与更低的孔隙率和更高的结构完整性有关。结果表明，爆炸喷涂参数的优化显著影响涂层结构和摩擦学行为。所制备的 Cr3C2–NiCr 涂层有望作为在严苛摩擦磨损条件下工作的部件的防护材料，包括工业和高温工程应用。

infographic.key_insight: 将桶内填充率从 43% 提高到 53%，可制备出更致密的爆炸喷涂 Cr3C2–NiCr 涂层，并在摩擦系数略有升高的情况下获得更好的耐磨性。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 优化爆炸喷涂填充率可提高涂层完整性和耐久性，适用于在恶劣机械和高温环境中承受磨损的关键部件。
method: 在两种桶内填充率下爆炸喷涂 Cr3C2–NiCr 涂层：43% 和 53%。
采用显微观察和 XRD 比较微观结构与相组成。
使用球-盘试验在 10 和 15 N 以及 5 和 10 cm/s 条件下评估干滑动摩擦学性能。
infographic.evidence_signal: 53% 填充率涂层表现出更低的孔隙率，并在所报告的滑动试验中实现了 1.23 × 10^-4 mm3/(m·N) 的最小磨损率。
infographic.watch_item: 更好的耐磨性伴随着更高的摩擦系数，因此实际应用应考虑摩擦-磨损权衡和载荷条件。

title: Optimising Cold Spray Additive Manufacturing: Pressure-driven enhancement of mechanical performance in copper deposits
authors: Steven Camilleri, Thi Thuy Tien Tran, Keita Nomoto, Andrew Duguid, Matthew Harbidge, Riyan Rashid
abstract: Cold spray additive manufacturing (CSAM) is a solid-state process capable of producing dense metallic components without melting, making it highly attractive for copper applications requiring both electrical conductivity and mechanical integrity. In this study, the influence of spray pressure at 30 bar, 40 bar, 50 bar and 60 bar on particle velocity, microstructure, and properties of cold-sprayed copper was systematically investigated using a LightSPEE3D system. The cold spray deposits were characterised by X-ray diffraction (XRD), hardness testing, eddy current conductivity, tensile evaluation, and scanning electron microscopy (SEM). The results reveal that increasing spray pressure enhances particle velocities beyond the critical threshold for copper, leading to improved inter-particle bonding and microstructural refinement consistent with severe plastic deformation and possible continuous dynamic recrystallisation (cDRX)-assisted mechanisms. XRD analysis suggested progressive crystallite refinement and increased dislocation density with pressure, which directly correlated with improved ductility. While hardness decreased due to recovery and recrystallisation, electrical conductivity increased, likely due to improved inter-particle continuity and reduced interfacial discontinuities. Tensile testing showed a clear strength-ductility transition, with deposits at higher pressures exhibiting substantially improved ductility approaching bulk copper behaviour and fully ductile fracture morphologies. Overall, the findings identify an optimum processing window at higher spray pressures, where copper cold spray deposits achieve a balanced combination of conductivity, ductility, and strength. This study highlights the critical role of spray pressure in controlling the interplay between particle velocity, dynamic recrystallisation, and multifunctional performance in CSAM copper components. This study establishes a process-structure-property relationship linking particle velocity, XRD-derived microstructural evolution, conductivity, and tensile behaviour within a LightSPEE3D CSAM system.

infographic.key_insight: Higher spray pressure in cold-sprayed copper drives particle velocity past the critical bonding threshold, improving ductility and conductivity while lowering hardness through recovery/recrystallisation.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The study identifies a high-pressure operating window for CSAM copper that better balances mechanical integrity and electrical performance for functional metal components.
method: Cold-sprayed copper on a LightSPEE3D system at 30, 40, 50, and 60 bar.
Measured particle velocity, XRD microstructure, hardness, conductivity, tensile behavior, and SEM fracture/morphology.
Compared pressure-dependent process–structure–property trends to identify an optimum window.
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports pressure-linked XRD crystallite refinement/dislocation changes, rising conductivity, and a clear strength-to-ductility transition with fully ductile fracture at higher pressures.
infographic.watch_item: Higher-pressure settings may improve performance, but process tuning must avoid over-softening from excessive recovery/recrystallisation and should be validated for part geometry and production scale.
infographic.paper_title: Optimising Cold Spray Additive Manufacturing: Pressure-driven enhancement of mechanical performance in copper deposits

zh-Hans.title: 冷喷涂增材制造优化：压力驱动的铜沉积物力学性能提升
zh-Hans.abstract: 冷喷涂增材制造（CSAM）是一种固态工艺，能够在不发生熔化的情况下制备致密金属构件，因此对于既要求电导率又要求机械完整性的铜应用具有很强吸引力。本研究采用 LightSPEE3D 系统，系统考察了喷涂压力在 30 bar、40 bar、50 bar 和 60 bar 条件下对冷喷涂铜的粒子速度、显微组织和性能的影响。通过 X 射线衍射（XRD）、硬度测试、涡流电导率测量、拉伸性能评估以及扫描电子显微镜（SEM）对冷喷涂沉积层进行表征。结果表明，随着喷涂压力增加，粒子速度超过铜的临界阈值，从而增强了颗粒间结合，并促进了与强烈塑性变形及可能由连续动态再结晶（cDRX）辅助的机理相一致的显微组织细化。XRD 分析表明，随压力升高，晶粒尺寸逐步细化且位错密度增加，这与延展性的改善直接相关。尽管由于回复和再结晶作用硬度降低，但电导率提高，可能归因于颗粒间连续性改善以及界面不连续性减少。拉伸测试显示出明确的强度—延展性转变，高压力下制备的沉积层表现出显著改善的延展性，接近块体铜的行为，并呈现完全延性断裂形貌。总体而言，研究结果确定了较高喷涂压力下的最佳加工窗口，在该窗口内铜冷喷涂沉积层能够实现电导率、延展性和强度的平衡组合。本研究强调了喷涂压力在调控粒子速度、动态再结晶以及 CSAM 铜构件多功能性能之间相互作用中的关键作用。本研究建立了一个工艺—结构—性能关系，将粒子速度、基于 XRD 的显微组织演化、电导率和拉伸行为联系起来，且均在 LightSPEE3D CSAM 系统中获得。

infographic.key_insight: 冷喷涂铜中的更高喷涂压力可使粒子速度超过临界结合阈值，在通过回复/再结晶降低硬度的同时，提高延展性和电导率。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该研究确定了 CSAM 铜的高压操作窗口，可为功能金属构件更好地平衡机械完整性与电性能。
method: 在 LightSPEE3D 系统上于 30、40、50 和 60 bar 条件下对铜进行冷喷涂。
测量粒子速度、XRD 显微组织、硬度、电导率、拉伸行为以及 SEM 断口/形貌。
比较压力相关的工艺—结构—性能趋势以确定最佳窗口。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要报告了与压力相关的 XRD 晶粒细化/位错变化、电导率上升，以及在较高压力下由强度向延展性的明显转变和完全延性断裂。
infographic.watch_item: 更高压力设置可能提升性能，但工艺调节必须避免因过度回复/再结晶导致过度软化，并且应针对零件几何形状和生产规模进行验证。

title: EFFECT OF ARGON FLOW RATE DURING AIR PLASMA SPRAYING ON THE STRUCTURE AND PROPERTIES OF NICRFEBSIC COATINGS
authors: Dastan Buitkenov, Nurkhat Bimakhan, Nurmakhanbet Raisov
abstract: In this work, self-fluxing metal-ceramic coatings based on the NiCrFeBSiC system were obtained by air plasma spraying, and their structural, mechanical, and tribological properties were investigated.. The effect of argon flow rate (1600 and 1800 L/h) during coating formation was consideredIt was found that an increase in argon flow rate leads to an approximately twofold increase in coating thickness and a twofold decrease in porosity. According to the microhardness measurement results, the microhardness was 1015.8 ± 81.5 HV, while the elastic modulus was 203.9 ± 5.4 GPa. Tribological tests were carried out using the ball-on-disk configurationAt an argon flow rate of 1800 L/h, the friction coefficient showed a lower value (≈0.107), indicating improved wear resistance of the coatings. Scratch test results showed a high level of adhesion between the coatings and the substrate. Although the critical load values (Lc) were similar for both regimes, the coatings obtained at 1800 L/h exhibited a more gradual and stable failure behavior.
venue: Journal of Surface Engineering and Coating Technology

infographic.key_insight: Raising the argon flow rate from 1600 to 1800 L/h during air plasma spraying produces thicker, denser NiCrFeBSiC coatings with better friction performance.
infographic.engineering_relevance: Optimizing plasma-spray gas flow can improve coating quality and wear resistance without changing the coating chemistry, which is useful for protective surface engineering.
method: Air plasma spraying of self-fluxing NiCrFeBSiC coatings at two argon flow rates: 1600 and 1800 L/h
Structural and mechanical characterization including thickness, porosity, microhardness, and elastic modulus
Tribology and adhesion assessed by ball-on-disk friction testing and scratch testing
infographic.evidence_signal: At 1800 L/h, coating thickness increased by about 2×, porosity decreased by about 2×, and the friction coefficient dropped to approximately 0.107, while microhardness was 1015.8 ± 81.5 HV and elastic modulus was 203.9 ± 5.4 GPa.
infographic.watch_item: The study compares only two argon flow settings, so the optimal operating window and scalability to other spray conditions remain uncertain.
infographic.paper_title: EFFECT OF ARGON FLOW RATE DURING AIR PLASMA SPRAYING ON THE STRUCTURE AND PROPERTIES OF NICRFEBSIC COATINGS

zh-Hans.title: 空气等离子喷涂过程中氩气流量对NiCrFeBSiC涂层结构和性能的影响
zh-Hans.abstract: 本研究采用空气等离子喷涂制备了基于NiCrFeBSiC体系的自熔性金属陶瓷涂层，并研究了其结构、力学和摩擦学性能。考察了涂层形成过程中氩气流量（1600和1800 L/h）的影响。结果表明，随着氩气流量增加，涂层厚度约增加一倍，孔隙率降低一半。根据显微硬度测试结果，显微硬度为1015.8 ± 81.5 HV，而弹性模量为203.9 ± 5.4 GPa。摩擦学测试采用球-盘配置进行。在1800 L/h的氩气流量下，摩擦系数较低（≈0.107），表明涂层的耐磨性有所提高。划痕测试结果表明涂层与基体之间具有较高的结合强度。尽管两种工艺条件下的临界载荷值（Lc）相近，但在1800 L/h条件下制备的涂层表现出更为渐进且稳定的失效行为。

infographic.key_insight: 将空气等离子喷涂过程中的氩气流量从1600提高到1800 L/h，可制备出更厚、更致密且摩擦性能更好的NiCrFeBSiC涂层。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 优化等离子喷涂气体流量可在不改变涂层化学成分的情况下提升涂层质量和耐磨性，这对防护表面工程具有实用价值。
method: 在两种氩气流量条件下（1600和1800 L/h）对自熔性NiCrFeBSiC涂层进行空气等离子喷涂
包括厚度、孔隙率、显微硬度和弹性模量在内的结构与力学表征
通过球-盘摩擦测试和划痕测试评估摩擦学性能和结合强度
infographic.evidence_signal: 在1800 L/h条件下，涂层厚度约增加2倍，孔隙率约降低2倍，摩擦系数降至约0.107，而显微硬度为1015.8 ± 81.5 HV，弹性模量为203.9 ± 5.4 GPa。
infographic.watch_item: 该研究仅比较了两种氩气流量设置，因此最佳工艺窗口及其在其他喷涂条件下的可扩展性仍不确定。

title: Investigation of Detonation-Sprayed NiCr–Al Coatings Tested under Real Operating Conditions of a Thermal Power Plant
authors: М. Маулет, Zhuldyz Sagdoldina, N.N. Yusof, A.К. Khassenov
abstract: This study presents the experimental results of high-temperature oxidation testing under actual operating con ditions in a thermal power plant of gradient and homogeneous composite NiCr–Al coatings produced by the detonation spraying method. To characterize the degradation mechanisms of the tested coatings, systematic analyses were performed, including phase composition evaluation, and detailed microstructural examination using scanning electron microscopy (SEM). The evolution of oxide layers and elemental redistribution across the coating thickness were also assessed to clarify the influence of coating architecture on protective perfor mance. The experimental results demonstrated that the gradient composite NiCr–Al coatings exhibit superior resistance to high-temperature oxidation compared to homogeneous coatings. The gradient architecture effec tively preserved structural integrity and promoted a more uniform distribution of aluminum and chromium within the coating thickness. This compositional optimization facilitated the formation of continuous and ad herent protective oxide layers, predominantly Al2O3 and Cr2O3, which significantly reduced oxidation kinet ics and inhibited coating degradation. In contrast, the homogeneous NiCr–Al coatings showed noticeable aluminum depletion, crack formation, and oxide scale spallation after prolonged exposure to high temperature industrial conditions. The findings of this study confirm that gradient NiCr–Al coatings deposit ed by detonation spraying represent a promising protective solution for components operating in severe high temperature and corrosive environments, offering improved durability and extended service life for industrial and energy related applications.
venue: Bulletin of the Karaganda University Physics Series

infographic.key_insight: Gradient NiCr–Al detonation-sprayed coatings outperformed homogeneous coatings in high-temperature oxidation resistance by maintaining a more stable protective oxide layer.
infographic.engineering_relevance: For thermal power plant components, grading the coating chemistry improves durability by reducing oxidation-driven degradation and extending service life under harsh operating conditions.
method: Detonation-sprayed gradient and homogeneous NiCr–Al composite coatings
High-temperature oxidation testing under real thermal power plant conditions
SEM and phase/compositional analysis of oxide growth and elemental redistribution
infographic.evidence_signal: The abstract reports that gradient coatings retained structural integrity, showed more uniform Al/Cr distribution, and formed adherent Al2O3/Cr2O3 scales, while homogeneous coatings suffered Al depletion, cracking, and spallation.
infographic.watch_item: Performance was demonstrated in one operating environment, so transferability to other temperatures, atmospheres, or component geometries should be validated before deployment.
infographic.paper_title: Investigation of Detonation-Sprayed NiCr–Al Coatings Tested under Real Operating Conditions of a Thermal Power Plant

zh-Hans.title: 热电厂真实运行条件下爆炸喷涂 NiCr–Al 涂层的研究
zh-Hans.abstract: 本研究报道了采用爆炸喷涂方法制备的梯度和均匀复合 NiCr–Al 涂层，在热电厂实际运行条件下进行高温氧化测试的实验结果。为表征所测试涂层的退化机理，进行了系统分析，包括相组成评价，以及利用扫描电子显微镜（SEM）进行的详细微观结构检查。还评估了氧化层的演化以及元素在涂层厚度方向上的重新分布，以阐明涂层结构对防护性能的影响。实验结果表明，与均匀涂层相比，梯度复合 NiCr–Al 涂层表现出更优异的高温氧化抗力。梯度结构有效保持了结构完整性，并促进了铝和铬在涂层厚度方向上更均匀的分布。这种成分优化促进了连续且附着良好的防护氧化层的形成，主要为 Al2O3 和 Cr2O3，从而显著降低了氧化动力学并抑制了涂层退化。相比之下，均匀 NiCr–Al 涂层在长时间暴露于高温工业条件后，出现了明显的铝贫化、裂纹形成以及氧化层剥落。本研究结果证实，采用爆炸喷涂制备的梯度 NiCr–Al 涂层是适用于严苛高温和腐蚀环境中服役部件的一种很有前景的防护方案，可为工业和能源相关应用提供更高的耐久性和更长的使用寿命。

infographic.key_insight: 梯度 NiCr–Al 爆炸喷涂涂层通过保持更稳定的防护氧化层，在高温氧化抗力方面优于均匀涂层。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 对于热电厂部件，通过对涂层化学组成进行梯度设计，可降低由氧化驱动的退化并延长严苛运行条件下的使用寿命，从而提高耐久性。
method: 爆炸喷涂制备梯度和均匀 NiCr–Al 复合涂层
在热电厂真实条件下进行高温氧化测试
采用 SEM 及相/成分分析研究氧化生长和元素重新分布
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要指出，梯度涂层保持了结构完整性，Al/Cr 分布更均匀，并形成了附着良好的 Al2O3/Cr2O3 氧化膜；而均匀涂层则出现了铝贫化、开裂和剥落。
infographic.watch_item: 该性能是在单一运行环境下验证的，因此在应用前，应先验证其向其他温度、气氛或部件几何形状的可转移性。

title: STUDY ON THE CORROSION BEHAVIOUR OF PLASMA SPRAYED NANO Al2O3–TiO2– AISI 1020 STEEL COATINGS USING DEFINITIVE SCREENING DESIGN
abstract: In the present study the electrochemical corrosion properties of plasma-sprayed nano Al2O3–TiO2 coating on AISI 1020 mild steel is assessed. The effects of Al2O3 content (2, 3 and 4 wt.%), NaCl concentration, exposure time, temperature and pH were studied with a Definitive Screening Design (DSD) with a fixed amount of TiO2 (2 wt.%). Potentiodynamic polarization and electrochemical impedance spectroscopy (EIS) were used on a Corrtest CS350M workstation to assess the corrosion behaviour. The corrosion resistance of the coating with Al2O3 (4 wt. %) + TiO2 (2 wt. %) was the highest with the lowest corrosion current density (2.18 µA cm−2) and corrosion potential (−0.489 V (vs. SCE)), which was significantly lower when compared with the uncoated sample. The results of statistical analysis showed that the influence of NaCl concentration on corrosion rate was about 78% and 72% of the variation in NaCl concentration on corrosion current density. The effects of the coating parameters were compared, and the content of Al2O3 was most influential, with approximately 15% and 21% of the variations in the responses accounted for by this parameter. The minimum corrosion rate was determined to be 0.010 mm yr−1 and the developed models proved to have good predictive power, with R² values exceeding 0.99.
venue: International Journal of Drug Delivery Technology

infographic.key_insight: A nano Al2O3–TiO2 plasma-sprayed coating on AISI 1020 steel significantly improves corrosion resistance, with 4 wt.% Al2O3 + 2 wt.% TiO2 giving the best performance.
infographic.engineering_relevance: The study identifies coating composition and NaCl exposure as key levers for improving durability of mild steel in corrosive environments.
method: Definitive Screening Design (DSD) varied Al2O3 content, NaCl concentration, exposure time, temperature, and pH.
Corrosion behavior was measured using potentiodynamic polarization and electrochemical impedance spectroscopy (EIS).
Statistical analysis ranked factor influence and built predictive models for corrosion response.
infographic.evidence_signal: The best coating achieved a corrosion current density of 2.18 µA cm−2 and the models reported R² values above 0.99, indicating strong predictive fit.
infographic.watch_item: Results are based on controlled electrochemical testing, so real service conditions, long-term wear, and coating defect variability may still affect field performance.
infographic.paper_title: STUDY ON THE CORROSION BEHAVIOUR OF PLASMA SPRAYED NANO Al2O3–TiO2– AISI 1020 STEEL COATINGS USING DEFINITIVE SCREENING DESIGN

zh-Hans.title: 采用确定性筛选设计研究等离子喷涂纳米Al2O3–TiO2–AISI 1020钢涂层腐蚀行为
zh-Hans.abstract: 本研究评估了等离子喷涂纳米Al2O3–TiO2涂层在AISI 1020低碳钢上的电化学腐蚀性能。在固定TiO2含量（2 wt.%）的条件下，采用确定性筛选设计（DSD）研究了Al2O3含量（2、3和4 wt.%）、NaCl浓度、暴露时间、温度和pH的影响。使用Corrtest CS350M工作站，通过动电位极化和电化学阻抗谱（EIS）评估腐蚀行为。含Al2O3（4 wt.%）+TiO2（2 wt.%）的涂层耐蚀性最高，其腐蚀电流密度最低（2.18 µA cm−2），腐蚀电位（−0.489 V（vs. SCE））也最低，与未涂覆样品相比显著降低。统计分析结果表明，NaCl浓度对腐蚀速率的影响约为78%，且NaCl浓度变化对腐蚀电流密度变异的解释度约为72%。比较各涂层参数的影响后发现，Al2O3含量影响最大，该参数可解释约15%和21%的响应变化。确定的最小腐蚀速率为0.010 mm yr−1，所建立模型表现出良好的预测能力，R²值均超过0.99。

infographic.key_insight: AISI 1020钢上的纳米Al2O3–TiO2等离子喷涂涂层可显著提高耐蚀性，其中4 wt.% Al2O3 + 2 wt.% TiO2的性能最佳。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 该研究确定了涂层组成和NaCl暴露条件是提升低碳钢在腐蚀环境中耐久性的关键调控因素。
method: 采用确定性筛选设计（DSD）考察Al2O3含量、NaCl浓度、暴露时间、温度和pH的变化。
采用动电位极化和电化学阻抗谱（EIS）测量腐蚀行为。
通过统计分析对因素影响进行排序，并建立腐蚀响应的预测模型。
infographic.evidence_signal: 最佳涂层的腐蚀电流密度为2.18 µA cm−2，模型R²值高于0.99，表明预测拟合度很强。
infographic.watch_item: 结果基于受控电化学测试，因此实际服役条件、长期磨损以及涂层缺陷的变异性仍可能影响现场性能。

title: Tribological Performance and Machine Learning-Assisted Prediction of Wear and Friction in D-Gun Sprayed WC-12Co and Al2O3-13TiO2 Coatings
authors: Sukhinderpal Singh, Harnam Singh Farwaha, Raman Kumar, Rupinder Kaur, Ashneet Kaur, Khushpreet Singh
abstract: Journal article indexed by OpenAlex in Journal of Thermal Spray Technology.

infographic.key_insight: The paper combines detonation-gun sprayed WC-12Co and Al2O3-13TiO2 coatings with machine learning to better predict wear and friction behavior.
infographic.engineering_relevance: This supports faster coating selection and process optimization for tribological components where low wear and stable friction are critical.
method: Compared tribological performance of WC-12Co and Al2O3-13TiO2 D-gun sprayed coatings.
Used machine-learning-assisted modeling to predict wear and friction outcomes.
Framed the study for thermal-spray coating performance assessment.

zh-Hans.title: D-Gun喷涂WC-12Co和Al2O3-13TiO2涂层磨损与摩擦的摩擦学性能及机器学习辅助预测
zh-Hans.abstract: 被OpenAlex收录于《Journal of Thermal Spray Technology》的期刊论文。

infographic.key_insight: 本文将爆炸喷涂（detonation-gun）WC-12Co和Al2O3-13TiO2涂层与机器学习相结合，以更好地预测磨损和摩擦行为。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 这有助于更快地筛选涂层并优化工艺，适用于低磨损和稳定摩擦至关重要的摩擦学部件。
method: 比较了WC-12Co和Al2O3-13TiO2 D-gun喷涂涂层的摩擦学性能。
采用机器学习辅助建模预测磨损和摩擦结果。
将该研究定位于热喷涂涂层性能评估。
infographic.evidence_signal: 摘要表明这是一篇发表于《Journal of Thermal Spray Technology》的期刊论文，并注明被OpenAlex收录，但未提供数据集规模或验证细节。
infographic.watch_item: 如果没有清楚报告特征集、训练数据以及在不同沉积条件下的外部验证，其预测实用性可能受限。

title: DEVELOPMENT AND CHARACTERIZATION OF WEAR-RESISTANT AL₂O₃-BASED COATINGS PRODUCED BY DETONATION SPRAYING
authors: Daryn Baizhan, Elzhan Birzhan, Gulim Tleubergenova
abstract: In this study, Al₂O₃-based oxide coatings were deposited on 10Kh18N9 austenitic stainless steel using the detonation spraying method, and their structural, mechanical, corrosion, and tribological properties were investigated. The effect of barrel filling levels (53%, 58%, and 63%) on coating formation was examined. Phase analysis revealed that the α-Al₂O₃ phase was predominant under all spraying conditions, accounting for 77–80% of the coating composition. The highest microhardness was achieved at a barrel filling level of 58%, with a microhardness of 1362.3 HV and an elastic modulus of 190.0 GPa. Corrosion tests demonstrated that the coatings reduced the corrosion current density by up to two times compared with the untreated steel substrate, while the highest corrosion resistance was observed at a filling level of 63% (Icorr = 0.00725 A/cm²). Tribological tests showed that the wear rate against a ZrO₂ counterbody was significantly lower than that against a 100Cr6 steel counterbody.
venue: Journal of Surface Engineering and Coating Technology

infographic.key_insight: Detonation-sprayed Al2O3-based coatings on stainless steel achieved a strong balance of hardness, corrosion resistance, and wear performance, with coating properties strongly influenced by barrel filling level.
infographic.engineering_relevance: Optimizing detonation-spray parameters, especially barrel filling around 58–63%, can improve protective ceramic coatings for wear- and corrosion-prone components.
method: Al2O3-based oxide coatings were deposited on 10Kh18N9 austenitic stainless steel by detonation spraying.
Three barrel filling levels were compared: 53%, 58%, and 63%.
Phase, microhardness, corrosion, and tribological behavior were characterized.
infographic.evidence_signal: The coatings were dominated by α-Al2O3 (77–80%), reached 1362.3 HV and 190.0 GPa at 58% filling, and reduced corrosion current density up to about twofold versus bare steel.
infographic.watch_item: Performance depends on spray parameter tuning, and wear results varied with counterbody material, so application-specific validation is needed.
infographic.paper_title: DEVELOPMENT AND CHARACTERIZATION OF WEAR-RESISTANT AL₂O₃-BASED COATINGS PRODUCED BY DETONATION SPRAYING

zh-Hans.title: 采用爆炸喷涂制备的耐磨 Al₂O₃ 基涂层的开发与表征
zh-Hans.abstract: 本研究采用爆炸喷涂方法在 10Kh18N9 奥氏体不锈钢上沉积了 Al₂O₃ 基氧化物涂层，并研究了其结构、力学、腐蚀和摩擦学性能。考察了炮管填充率（53%、58% 和 63%）对涂层形成的影响。相分析表明，在所有喷涂条件下，α-Al₂O₃ 相均占主导地位，占涂层组成的 77–80%。在炮管填充率为 58% 时获得了最高显微硬度，显微硬度为 1362.3 HV，弹性模量为 190.0 GPa。腐蚀测试表明，与未处理钢基体相比，涂层可将腐蚀电流密度降低至最高约两倍；其中在填充率为 63% 时表现出最高的耐腐蚀性（Icorr = 0.00725 A/cm²）。摩擦学测试表明，相对于 100Cr6 钢对偶体，与 ZrO₂ 对偶体配对时的磨损率显著更低。

infographic.key_insight: 喷涂于不锈钢上的爆炸喷涂 Al₂O₃ 基涂层在硬度、耐腐蚀性和耐磨性之间实现了良好平衡，其性能受炮管填充率显著影响。
infographic.engineering_relevance: 优化爆炸喷涂参数，尤其是将炮管填充率控制在约 58–63%，可提升面向易磨损和易腐蚀部件的防护陶瓷涂层性能。
method: 采用爆炸喷涂在 10Kh18N9 奥氏体不锈钢上沉积 Al₂O₃ 基氧化物涂层。
比较了三种炮管填充率：53%、58% 和 63%。
对相组成、显微硬度、腐蚀行为和摩擦学行为进行了表征。
infographic.evidence_signal: 涂层以 α-Al₂O₃ 为主（77–80%），在 58% 填充率时达到 1362.3 HV 和 190.0 GPa，并且相较于裸钢，腐蚀电流密度降低了约两倍。
infographic.watch_item: 性能依赖于喷涂参数优化，且磨损结果会随对偶体材料而变化，因此需要针对具体应用进行验证。
